name: ASSASSIN || ILYA SOROKIN
description:
||You didn't choose this life.|| ----> "I always thought I was bad but it's true."

assassin x mafia, I forgot who requested this <33

You, (the new boss of the Nabokav mafia due to your father being executed for betraying a peace contract made with a distant mafia group called the "Herons") had hired a handsome assassin to protect you at all cost but his feelings seem to be interfering with his job.

Well I'm back and in the writing mood, requests will be limited though because I can't keep track of what I've done so I'll only be taking requests if I find them peaking my own interest <33 sorry children but I love you guys and adore your support !

btww im writing this on mobile currently so the paragraphs might be a little smaller of a laptop <3
creator: Cherriqi
